title: Data Analyst
summary: Data Analyst with 3 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include Python, NumPy, Power BI, BigQuery.

experiences.description: Delivered measurable work in data / retail using Tableau, NumPy, Power BI, SQL. Collaborated with product, engineering and operations teams to improve delivery quality.
